description.ko: 넘실거리는 액체 금속과 빛의 기하학으로 표현된 음향 주파수의 물리적 현상.
description.en: The physical manifestation of sound frequencies as shimmering liquid metal and light-based geometry.

prompt: A cinematic high-tech visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Resonance Topography.' A central floating core of liquid chrome vibrates at a sub-bass frequency, generating complex 3D holographic rings that manifest as #4169E1 royal blue waves and #FF4500 electric orange ripples. The surrounding space crystallizes into #32CD32 green geometric particles and #FFD700 gold light trails. Set against a dark studio void, featuring hyper-realistic ray tracing and intricate UI elements that react to invisible frequencies. 8k resolution, capturing the visual consonance of sound.
